# Copilot Instructions

- This repository is a Vite React TypeScript portfolio site.
- Prefer reusable components under src/components and section composition under src/sections when expanding the app.
- Keep the visual style dark, futuristic, glassmorphic, and responsive.
- Use Framer Motion for transitions and @react-three/fiber/@react-three/drei for 3D hero effects.
- Keep project data in src/data/portfolio.ts so content stays easy to update.
